jobs.title: Lead, Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: L3Harris is dedicated to recruiting and developing high-performing talent who are passionate about what they do. Our employees are unified in a shared dedication to our customers’ mission and quest for professional growth. L3Harris provides an inclusive, engaging environment designed to empower employees and promote work-life success. Fundamental to our culture is an unwavering focus on values, dedication to our communities, and commitment to excellence in everything we do. L3Harris is the Trus…

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Bilingue FR/EN. The sky's the limit. A seat at the table, with the people who can actually move things, in a business that's already working. Now we're levelling up to what's next. If that landed, keep reading. Who we are It started with two founders, a basement, and a phone book. Two years of cold calls before there was even an office to make them from. The people running this floor today are the ones who did that work. They remember what it takes. Which is why product judgment carries real we…

jobs.title: Chef de Produits (Product Manager)
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Contexte de l'entreprise Opsun est un leader canadien dans la conception, l'ingénierie et la fabrication de structures de montage solaires en aluminium. Nous desservons l'ensemble de l'Amérique du Nord — Canada, États-Unis, Mexique et Caraïbes — avec un siège social à Québec et des installations de production à Cornwall (Ontario) et High Point (Caroline du Nord). Notre gamme couvre toutes les applications du marché commercial et résidentiel : toits plats, montages au sol, abris d'auto, toits in…

jobs.title: Product Manager, Security Product Management
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Worker Sub-Type: Regular Job Description: Job Summary We are seeking an experienced Product Manager to drive the planning, execution, and delivery of secure communications solutions in a highly regulated, security‑sensitive environment. jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Job Description Are you looking to grow in a strategic role where your analytical skills and coordination abilities directly contribute to sales growth? Join our dynamic Product Management team! As a Product Manager , you will work closely with Senior Market Managers to support the management and development of specific product lines.
